footer.description: Skills recognition platform to support professional growth at Softinsa.
footer.contactText: Questions or suggestions: internal support for the Badges PINT platform.

home.title: Learn, apply and prove your growth with badges.
home.subtitle: Explore paths by area, choose badges aligned with your career and track the validation of your skills in a modern experience.

chooseArea.text: Filter skills by your professional focus.

apply.text: Send the request and keep the workflow tracked.
